CustomField.description: Created as part of MKT26-1165 to indicate Workload is consuming 85% of Total License Count. Applies only to Telemetry.
CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( NOT( ISBLANK( Total_License_Count__c ) ), (( Automated_Object_Capacity__c / Total_License_Count__c) > 0.85 ) ),
"#980000", "" )
CustomField.label: Cell Highlight Override
